LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_Harvest.label: Evolution point harvesting
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_Harvest.description: The Iris Seed drains the target's intelligence and converts it into evolution points. Although it takes a while to complete the consumption, it will kill the target directly.
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_PsychicLoadDump.label: Load backlash
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_PsychicLoadDump.descript: The illithid exports the powerful load it endures to the target. If the target does not have psionic abilities, the backlash will kill the target immediately; individuals with psionic abilities can avoid this fatal impact, but a large amount of psychic entropy will accumulate.
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyShoot.label: psychic projectile
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyShoot.description: Charges briefly and then fires a set of psychic projectiles.
LanguageData.Bullet_ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyShoot.label: psychic projectile
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyPsuh.label: Psychic Push
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyPsuh.description: Instantly releases directed psychic energy to damage nearby enemies, then knocks them away and stuns them.
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyHemostasis.label: Stop bleeding
LanguageData.ARA_Neurotyrant_T1_PsyHemostasis.descrip: Use psychic energy to forcefully seal the target's wounds, temporarily stopping blood loss.
